name: github_add_user_copilot_space_collaborator
description: Add a collaborator to a user Copilot Space (POST /users/{username}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}/collaborators). Requires actor_type (User|Team), actor_identifier, and role (reader|writer|admin). Returns HTTP 201. See [Add a collaborator to a Copilot Space for a user](https://docs.github.com/en/rest
